title: Clothes Make the Pirate
actors: Leon Errol, Dorothy Gish, Nita Naldi
plot: The film is a comedy that centers on a disgruntled 18th century Bostonian, played by Errol, who while wishing that he was a pirate, dons the clothes and play-acts the part. He is mistaken for the real pirate, Dixie Bull (played by...
